raw.message: Secrets Within Boxes: Uncover the Mystery

hook.summary: A man sitting on a toilet claims he's cracked three safes but is stuck on a Martian one.
hook.visual_action: The camera enters a bathroom to reveal a man sitting on a toilet holding a phone, looking directly at the viewer.
hook.voiceover_transcript: I've cracked three safes today and I still can't figure out this Martian one.

scene_flow: UGC intro of a man in a bathroom talking about his puzzle progress.
Transition to game footage of a Martian-themed safe with the man in a PiP overlay.
Demonstration of solving a dial-based puzzle within the game.
The safe opens to reveal a high-tech interior as the man issues a challenge to the viewer.
on_screen_text: We're finally on Mars, Nathan. Ready to explore these Martian vaults?
Let me try. Watch me solve it faster than you.
Ha! Told you I'm the puzzle master.
Download the Vault Logic Puzzle Box and see if you can beat my record.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy logic puzzles and brain teasers with a competitive edge.
